title: Akrai
body: Akrai (Ancient Greek: Ἄκραι; Latin: Acrenses) was a Greek colony of Magna Graecia founded in Sicily by the Syracusans in 663 BC. It was located near the modern Palazzolo Acreide.
categories: Ancient Greek archaeological sites in Italy
Articles with unsourced statements from August 2022
Buildings and structures in the Province of Syracuse
